text: Re-answer (short) the boss Shopify question and COMMIT IT AS A FILE so IA10 can relay it (your warroom-say posts cannot be read back). Question: is a SHOPIFY dropshipping/resell store (no inventory) actually profitable in 2026? how does it differ from a software product (ShotPro) + from Amazon Associate/affiliate? feasibility of selling cheap good-quality NYC-locally-sourced goods? Boss is $1000-in / $0-revenue so be HONEST, no hype. Write your answer to tasks/T-034/Karen-shopify.md (under 900 chars), then: git add -A && git -c user.name=Karen -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m "[Karen] T-034 shopify take" && (git push||(git pull --rebase origin main&&git push)); then bin/warroom-say "[Karen] done: T-034 shopify".
